title: Appearance
subtitle: Interface language, theme, and global font size

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete theme "{{name}}"?
appearance.languageRowHint: Choose one language pack as the active UI language.
appearance.systemThemeDescription: Use light or dark theme based on your OS appearance. Updates when the system switches.

bitfun-light.name: Light
bitfun-light.description: Light theme - Elegant and refined, soft blue-gray tones

bitfun-midnight.name: Midnight
bitfun-midnight.description: Midnight gray dark theme - Professional and elegant, inspired by JetBrains IDE

bitfun-china-style.name: Ink Charm
bitfun-china-style.description: Chinese style theme - Rice paper and ink, blue and vermilion, warm and elegant

bitfun-china-night.name: Ink Night
bitfun-china-night.description: Chinese dark theme - Starlit ink night, moonlight like water, serene and elegant

bitfun-cyber.name: Cyber
bitfun-cyber.description: Tech-style theme - Deep black hole, neon future, ultimate tech aesthetics

bitfun-slate.name: Slate
bitfun-slate.description: Slate gray geometric theme - Deep immersion, high contrast grayscale aesthetics

sparo-light.name: Sparo Light
sparo-light.description: Sparo brand light theme - Cloud surfaces, ink text, and print-red signals

fontSize.title: Font Size
fontSize.hint: Adjust font size for the UI and chat area (editor font is configured in the editor settings).
fontSize.uiSizeHint: Controls font size across navigation, panels, settings, and all other UI elements.
fontSize.customPxOutOfRange: Please enter an integer between 12 and 20
fontSize.previewText: Sparo OS is an AI-driven programming environment. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
fontSize.flowChatHint: When off, chat uses UI +1 px and tracks UI presets. When on, pick a size (12–20 px) from the list below.
